description_long: This is a tall, stone monument featuring a classical female statue atop a multi-tiered pedestal. The statue is draped in flowing robes and raises one arm, possibly holding an object or gesturing upward. The pedestal is ornately detailed, with decorative cornices and recessed panels on each face, and sits on a broad, weathered stone base. The monument shows signs of aging, with discoloration and some moss or grime near the bottom. The overall design is reminiscent of 19th-century memorials or civic monuments commonly found in parks or plazas. The structure is solid and imposing, intended as a permanent fixture in an urban landscape.
description: A tall stone monument with a classical female statue atop an ornate, multi-tiered pedestal and a broad, weathered base. The structure features detailed carvings and a sense of historical gravitas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the female statue facing forward with her arm raised, and the most detailed face of the pedestal with visible paneling.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the statue's profile and the layered structure of the pedestal, with some weathering visible on the base.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the back of the statue and the less ornate side of the pedestal, with more discoloration on the base.
description_view_3: Back view showing the statue from behind, with the arm raised and the broadest section of the base visible.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative cornices and recessed panels on the pedestal; classical draped female statue with raised arm on top.
attribute_base_design: The base is broad and rectangular, constructed from large stone blocks with visible weathering and discoloration. It features a stepped design with a slightly protruding lower platform.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is formed by the raised arm of the female statue, which is detailed and sculpted, with the statue's head and arm being the highest points.
